items.caption: A breathtaking aerial view of the balaklava peninsula in crimea. the peninsula, with its unique hill-shaped beach, is nestled between the deep blue waters of the black sea and the lighter blue waters of the sea of azov. the beach is densely populated with greenery, providing a stark contrast to the sandy terrain. taken from a high altitude, offering a panoramic perspective of the peninsula's natural beauty. the drone footage captures the intricate details of the landscape, making it a captivating stock photography.
